primary_question: Which TP/TW sensors can be mapped to defensible 1D path positions for score-only interpretation?
acceptance_signal: Every TP/TW sensor is mapped bounded or excluded with reason; validation holdout and external temperatures stay score-only.
guardrail: Coordinate with existing TODO-PRED-SENSOR-MAP; no validation-temperature runtime inputs.

primary_question: Can a setup-only axial-mixing upcomer-stratification or test-section heat-loss candidate reduce persistent TW5/TW6 residuals without leakage?
acceptance_signal: Candidate either becomes admission-ready input to S11 or is published as falsification evidence.
guardrail: No CFD mdot realized wallHeatFlux imposed cooler duty realized test-section heat or target temperatures as runtime inputs.

primary_question: What evidence is required to promote upcomer recirculation/onset diagnostics into defensible exchange-QOI or closure claims?
acceptance_signal: Ordinary upcomer Nu f_D and K remain disabled unless gates pass; missing terminal/source data become exact sampler or harvest requirements.
guardrail: No sampler harvest or solver launch unless separately claimed; no ordinary upcomer closure admission in planning-only evidence.

primary_question: Can pressure/F6/two-tap evidence support low-recirculation straight-leg friction or component-loss claims?
acceptance_signal: No component K or F6 claim is admitted unless isolation recirculation UQ and source/property gates pass with improvement over F3_shah_apparent.
guardrail: No clipped K hidden multiplier or mixed-basis promotion.

primary_question: Does a specific admission-worthy candidate pass the source/property/split refresh needed before freeze?
acceptance_signal: Exactly one candidate is either released for predeclared freeze or blocked with reason; protected rows remain score-only.
guardrail: Run only after S8 S9 or S10 produces an admission-worthy candidate; no broad holdout external future or support release.

primary_question: How should rejected closures and blocked scorecards be written as scientific contributions?
acceptance_signal: Pressure/F6 non-admission recirculation disablement source/split discipline and blocked frozen-scorecard logic are publication-ready without overclaiming.
guardrail: No final accuracy closure admission or thesis body edit unless a later exact-file row claims it.
